name: Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services
description: U.S. federal agency that administers Medicare, Medicaid, CHIP, and the Health Insurance Marketplace; publishes most of the digital quality measures used by this accelerator.

name: The Joint Commission
description: Independent, not-for-profit organization that accredits and certifies U.S. health care organizations and programs; publishes hospital ORYX core measures.

name: National Committee for Quality Assurance
description: Private, non-profit organization that maintains the HEDIS measure set used by health plans for accreditation and quality reporting.
